details.callToWorship: Praise God from Whom All Blessings Flow #253
details.fellowshipSong: Tis So Sweet to Trust in Jesus #411
details.fourthSong: Rock of Ages, Cleft for Me #342

list: June 16: Free Shoot Hoops not Drugs tour event from 4-7 PM at CCHS. Former UK team member Jarrod Polson will conduct the camp. All school-age children are invited to participate.
June 27: Men’s Discipleship Breakfast at 8:00 AM hosted by Mark Deaton.

July 6: Women on Mission will meet at 6:00 PM in the Lewis Fellowship Hall. Linda Baker will present the program, and Rayanna Baker will provide the food. All women are encouraged and invited to attend.
